command:
bash -c '
cat > /opt/docker/stacks/infra/nats/docker-compose.yml << '"'"'COMPOSEEOF'"'"'
version: '"'"'3'"'"'

services:
  nats:
    image: nats:2.10-alpine
    container_name: moreno-nats
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - '"'"'4222:4222'"'"'
      - '"'"'8222:8222'"'"'
    volumes:
      - ./config/nats.conf:/etc/nats/nats.conf:ro
      - nats_data:/data
    command: ['"'"'-c'"'"', '"'"'/etc/nats/nats.conf'"'"']

volumes:
  nats_data:
    driver: local
COMPOSEEOF
echo COMPOSE_FIXED
cat /opt/docker/stacks/infra/nats/docker-compose.yml | head -5
'
